title: Unlock FHA Opportunities for Your Clients
subtitle: Harness the power of FHA loans to assist credit-challenged clients, offer low down payments, and manage higher DTI ratios. Discover how to identify and structure FHA loans for increased loan closures.
keyTakeaways: Identify FHA candidates with credit scores as low as 580.
Structure loans with down payments as low as 3.5%.
Utilize FHA for clients with higher DTI ratios.
Engage manual underwriting for borderline cases.
Leverage FHA streamline refinance for existing borrowers.

sections.heading: Spotting FHA Opportunities
sections.body: Ensure you're not overlooking potential FHA borrowers. FHA loans offer significant advantages for clients who may not qualify for conventional loans due to credit scores or DTI ratios.
bullets: Target clients with credit scores starting at 580.
Offer solutions with low down payments of 3.5%.
Consider FHA for clients with higher DTI ratios.

sections.heading: Structuring FHA Loans Efficiently
sections.body: Properly structuring FHA loans can lead to successful loan closures. Review clients' financials to ensure they meet FHA guidelines and use manual underwriting for borderline cases.
bullets: Review borrower's financials for FHA compliance.
Consider manual underwriting for borderline cases.
Utilize FHA streamline refinance for current FHA clients.

sections.heading: Action Steps for Brokers
sections.body: Implement these strategies to increase your loan closures. Identify FHA candidates, partner with realtors, and leverage PRO Portal for efficient loan processing.
bullets: Identify potential FHA candidates in your database.
Collaborate with realtors to find first-time homebuyers.
Log in to PRO Portal to price and lock rates swiftly.
Educate referral partners on the benefits of FHA loans.

metaDescription: Explore FHA loan advantages for brokers: low down payments, credit flexibility, and high DTI allowances to close more loans.
